allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) events = data.get\(''events'', []\) if not events: for league in data.get\(''leagues'', []\): events.extend\(league.get\(''events'', []\)\) completed = [e for e in events if ''FINAL'' in str\(e.get\(''status'', {}\).get\(''type'', {}\).get\(''name'', ''''\)\)] e = completed[0] comp = \(e.get\(''competitions''\) or [{}]\)[0] # Show all comp keys and tournament details print\(''Competition keys:'', list\(comp.keys\(\)\)\) for k in [''purse'', ''purseAmount'', ''prize'', ''prizeAmount'', ''totalPrize'']: print\(f''{k}:'', comp.get\(k\)\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) events = data.get\(''events'', []\) if events: e = events[0] comp = \(e.get\(''competitions''\) or [{}]\)[0] # Check competitors for statistics competitors = comp.get\(''competitors'', []\) print\(''Competitors:'', len\(competitors\)\) if competitors: c = competitors[0] print\(''Competitor keys:'', list\(c.keys\(\)\)\) print\(''Statistics:'', c.get\(''statistics''\)\) print\(''Order:'', c.get\(''order''\)\) print\(''Athlete:'', c.get\(''athlete'', {}\).get\(''displayName''\)\) print\(\) # Check cuts for c in competitors[:5]: status_str = '''' stats = c.get\(''statistics'', []\) print\(f''Order {c.get\(""order""\)}: {c.get\(""athlete"", {}\).get\(""displayName""\)} - stats: {stats}''\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) items = d.get\(''items'', []\) print\(''Total competitors:'', d.get\(''count''\), ''Retrieved:'', len\(items\)\) # Show first and last few orders print\(''First 5 orders:'', [\(i.get\(''id''\), i.get\(''order''\)\) for i in items[:5]]\) print\(''Last 5 orders:'', [\(i.get\(''id''\), i.get\(''order''\)\) for i in items[-5:]]\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for cat in d.get\(''splits'', {}\).get\(''categories'', []\): for s in cat.get\(''stats'', []\): if s.get\(''name''\) in \(''amount'', ''officialAmount'', ''scoreToPar''\): print\(s[''name''], '':'', s.get\(''displayValue''\), ''/'', s.get\(''value''\)\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\(''Name:'', d.get\(''displayName''\)\) print\(''Country:'', d.get\(''citizenship''\) or d.get\(''countryFlag'', {}\).get\(''alt''\)\) print\(''Top keys:'', list\(d.keys\(\)\)[:15]\) ")
